title: VisualDx - Clinical Decision Support
problem: Dermatological diagnosis is challenging for non-specialists due to visual complexity and vast number of possible conditions.
solution: Clinical decision support tool with comprehensive medical image library and AI-powered differential diagnosis builder for skin conditions.
technology: Medical image database, AI-powered search, clinical knowledge base
target_customer: Primary care, dermatologists, medical education, emergency medicine
ai_type: AI-powered visual search and differential diagnosis
regulatory_notes: Clinical decision support, not diagnostic device
varden_fit: Moderate - Diagnostic support tool. Helps primary care with dermatology cases, potentially reducing unnecessary referrals.
notes: Established clinical reference. Strong image library. Used widely in medical education.
